mapper.insert: INSERT INTO reports ( user_id, profile_id, target_job_id, title, content_json, polished_content ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{profileId}, #{targetJobId}, #{title}, #{contentJson}, #{polishedContent} )
mapper.update: UPDATE reports SET title = #{title}, content_json = #{contentJson}, polished_content = #{polishedContent}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
